description: Sadhguru/Isha Foundation operates public websites and internal systems including Global PRS, a unified registration platform for Isha programs worldwide. It also hosts a Miracle Of Mind MCP endpoint under the sadhguru.org domain.
summary: sadhguru.org exposes a documented Global PRS HTTP API (OpenAPI listed, authenticated with bearer token plus x-system-token) and a public Miracle Of Mind MCP server at https://miracle-mcp.sadhguru.org/mcp.
